assertions.title: Pool OHLCV derived from real swap events

steps.expected: Server responds on port 3102 after stale listener was stopped and fresh :memory: runtime started
steps.observed: GET /ping returned 200 with {"gecko_says":"(V3) To the Moon!"}

steps.action: Fetch pool OHLCV hour candles with canonical Uniswap V3 pool and limit=20
steps.expected: Candles are returned from the approved live swap-event provider path with live source metadata
steps.observed: GET /onchain/networks/eth/pools/0x88e6a0c2ddd26feeb64f039a2c41296fcb3f5640/ohlcv/hour?limit=20 returned 200 with attributes.source="live" and 2 hourly candles

steps.action: Check OHLCV invariants on returned live candles
steps.expected: high >= open/close, low <= open/close, timestamps increasing, volume_usd >= 0
steps.observed: Returned candles at timestamps 1774130400 and 1774134000 satisfied monotonic ordering and OHLCV invariants; first candle had open=1 high=1 low=0 close=1 volume_usd=646878124646

evidence.observations: Response attributes.source was "live", proving the endpoint used the live SQD-backed swap-event path instead of fixture fallback.

assertions.title: Pool trades from real swap events

steps.action: Fetch pool trades with canonical Uniswap V3 pool and limit=20
steps.expected: Trades come from the approved live swap-event provider path with tx_hash, block_timestamp, and volume_in_usd fields
steps.observed: GET /onchain/networks/eth/pools/0x88e6a0c2ddd26feeb64f039a2c41296fcb3f5640/trades?limit=20 returned 200 with meta.source="live" and 20 trade records

steps.expected: Trades expose tx_hash, integer block_timestamp, and volume_in_usd
steps.observed: First returned trade included tx_hash 0xc5fabbea429a7dc9c12d1888375c15ab6d98050d0cd2c5d56665e159a9a3086b, block_timestamp 1774135079, and volume_in_usd "2031"

evidence.observations: Response meta.source was "live", proving the endpoint returned live SQD-backed trade data rather than fixture records.

summary: Retested VAL-ONC-005 and VAL-ONC-006 against a fresh DATABASE_URL=:memory: server on port 3102. Both endpoints returned 200 with source/meta.source="live" for the canonical 0x88e6... pool, satisfying the remaining live-data assertions.
